issues.title: Typo in documentation - section EmbeddingClient#Available Implementations
issues.body: I think there's a typo in this section: https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/embeddings.html#_available_implementations, the first bullet point is: "OpenAI: Using the **Sprig** AI OpenAiApi library" but maybe it should be:  "OpenAI: Using the **Spring** AI OpenAiApi library"

issues.title: Review ChatClient documentation
issues.body: There is content duplicated in the top level section for ChatClient that is now repeated, due to it being included in model vendor specific subsections.

comments.body: moved ChatModel diagram to bottom.  Looks like this was cleaned up in some other commits.

issues.title: Add contribution guidelines
issues.body: Create a section for contributors interested in adding a new client type, e.g   audio -> text (transcription) that covers the 'generic model' being used as well as preferences in libraries (Flux vs. others)
